description: Phase 15 scan_audit_summary trail_integrity: the reports/n6_meta_audit.jsonl must be append-only in practice — ts non-decreasing across entries AND engine_version never downgrades (semver). Any non-zero count signals the trail was rewritten/truncated/back-dated, invalidating the audit chain.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_audit_summary.json ] && jq -r "if (.trail_integrity.ts_regressions == 0) and (.trail_integrity.version_downgrades == 0) then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_audit_summary.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
